title: aster novi-belgii subsp. floribundus
intro: Aster novi-belgii subsp. floribundus, also known as the New York aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aster novi-belgii subsp. floribundus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
